Global (All).title: Tensions Rise Over Taiwan Strait Travel Ban
Global (All).summary: China has introduced new travel restrictions for Taiwanese residents, escalating tensions in the Taiwan Strait

Global (All).title: Global Economic Consequences of Ukraine Conflict Loom
Global (All).summary: The ongoing conflict in Ukraine has heightened concerns about potential disruptions to global trade and supply chains,

Global (All).title: US-China Competition Heats Up in the South China Sea
Global (All).summary: Increased military activity and tensions between the US and China in the South China Sea have raised concerns about regional stability

United States.summary: US Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade, sparking widespread protests
US House of Representatives passes gun control bill despite opposition from some Republican senators
US Customs and Border Protection implements new biometric screening for all international travelers

South Korea.title: Seoul's Mayor Suspends Campaign Due to Embezzlement Probe
South Korea.summary: South Korea's capital city of Seoul is facing a leadership crisis after its mayor suspended his election campaign amid an investigation into allegations of embezzlement.

South Korea.title: North Korea Fires Ballistic Missiles Amid US-South Korea Drills
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired multiple ballistic missiles in the direction of the Sea of Japan, prompting a response from the international community, including the United States and South Korea, where joint military exercises are ongoing.

South Korea.title: Anti-Government Protests Erupt in South Korea Over President's Handling of Economy)
South Korea.summary: Thousands of South Koreans took to the streets in major cities to protest President Yoon Suk-yeol's economic policies, which they claim have had a negative impact on the country's inflation.

Japan.title: Tokyo's Shinjuku district sees protests against Japan's COVID-19 response
Japan.summary: A small but vocal group of protesters gathered in Tokyo's Shinjuku district on 13 Jul to criticise Japan's COVID-19 policies, despite the country's low transmission rates. Protesters called for greater transparency and stricter measures to combat the spread of the virus.

Japan.title: North Korea claims it has test-fired new missiles capable of hitting Japan
Japan.summary: Pyongyang claims that it has successfully test-fired two new missiles, capable of reaching Japan. The development comes as the Biden administration is expected to provide South Korea with advanced anti-ballistic missile systems to counter the North Korean threat.

Japan.title: Anti-whaling demonstrations in Japan ahead of whaling season
Japan.summary: Environmental activists are staging a series of protests across Japan to call for an end to the country's whaling industry. The demonstrations come as Japan prepares to resume commercial whaling in the southern waters of the country.
